scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "cd client && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n client,server,model -c blue,green,yellow "cd client && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev" "python server_4b_api.py"
scripts.build: cd client && npm ci && npm run build && cd ../server && npm ci && npm run build
